title: Shattering Savory Jamaican Fish Grill
description: A refreshing and energizing Jamaican fusion dish featuring grilled fish, with a satisfying crunch from the onion salt. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: yakimono-grill seasoning
ingredients.notes: available at Asian markets or online

instructions: Preheat the yakimono-grill to medium-high heat, about 4000F.
Season the cod fillets with salt, pepper, and yakimono-grill seasoning.Mix together the grated ginger, garlic, lemongrass, and all-purpose flour in a shallow dish.
Coat the cod fillets with the ginger-garlic flour mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Brush the yakimono-grill with coconut oil and cook the cod fillets for 4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
